title: Desmodium rhynchodesmum
taxonomy: Desmodium rhynchodesmum is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a part of the genus Desmodium and is native to Mexico. The classification of Desmodium rhynchodesmum is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the phylum Angiospermophyta. More specifically, its classification is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, order Fabales, family Fabaceae, genus Desmodium, species D. rhynchodesmum. The classification of Desmodium rhynchodesmum is an example of a binomial nomenclature.
